name: duplicate-retrieval-results
description: customer-support-bot retrieval step returns duplicate chunks in 60% of traces. Same content appears 2-3 times in the retrieved context, wasting context window and potentially confusing the agent.
projectMemory:
## Project Agents
- **customer-support-bot**: Handles customer inquiries via RAG. Typical trace has 3-5 LLM calls, 1-2 retrieval steps. Normal latency: 2-4s per trace.
- **email-classifier**: Classifies incoming emails. Single LLM call per trace, ~500ms.
- **doc-summarizer**: Summarizes uploaded documents. 2-3 LLM calls, varies by doc length. Normal latency: 5-15s.

## Baselines
- Error rate: <2%
- Daily cost: ~$8
- Trace volume: ~300/day
- customer-support-bot: ~150/day
- email-classifier: ~100/day
- doc-summarizer: ~50/day

retrieval.note: duplicate rate spiked from 5% to 60% — suggests a vector store indexing issue

input.note: traces with duplicate retrieval use ~60% more input tokens
